---
name: docs-governance
description: Normalizes documentation ownership, removes duplication, fixes links and keeps AI context lean.
---

# Docs Governance

## Use when
Use when docs are moved/deleted/rewritten, backlog/status changes, or AI context is updated.

## Workflow
1. Find the owner document for each fact.
2. Delete stale compatibility pointers after migrating references.
3. Keep AI entrypoints short.
4. Fix links.
5. Update done-log/current-focus/status only when applicable.

## Output
- Findings or changes required
- Tests/docs affected
- Validation commands/results
- Remaining risks or unknowns
